chunks.text:
1-800 Water Damage of NE Dallas & SE Collin — Water damage restoration serving NE Dallas and SE Collin County. Services:
- Water damage restoration
- Flood cleanup
- Mold remediation
- Sewage cleanup
- Emergency response 24/7

- Address: 1821 Belt Line Rd, Garland, TX 75044
- Website: https://www. 1800waterdamage. com/ne-dallas-se-collin/
- Service Area: NE Dallas and SE Collin County

Rating: 4.
